sglang.title: support prometheus metrics
sglang.author: Lzhang-hub
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
@binarycrayon  1461 provides a good start.
Since the latest code scheduling of sglang is integrated into schulder.py, so I implemented a version of prometheus metrics based on 1461 and the latest code.

Modifications

vllm.author: russellb

PR #8537 changed this code to bind the TCP port prior to the engine
starting to ensure that port isn't used unexpectedly by something
launched during the engine startup. (ray is mentioned in the
discussino history and the comment in the code)

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Limit github CI jobs based on files changed
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I noticed that these github CI jobs run against all PRs, including ones where
the job is not relevant. We can save a bit of time and resources by only running
jobs when relevant files have changed.
This PR would reduce the jobs that run by quite a bit on a PR that only changes
docs, for example.
8f2

vllm.title: [Model] Support quantization of PixtralHFTransformer for PixtralHF
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Allows us to support quantization of the vision encoder for PixtralHF, where before we could only quantize the language model. Also converts the raw torch nn.Linear modules to proper merged vLLM Linear modules
Tested with

neuralmagic/pixtral-12b-FP8-dynamic (only MistralModel quantized)
nm-testing/

vllm.title: [Feature] Update benchmark_throughput.py to support image input
vllm.author: lk-chen
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Update benchmark_throughput to support image input. Tested with ShareGPT4V
on top of #9779 to tackle #9778
Tested with
# Download GPT4V dataset according to README, then
python vllm/benchmarks/benchmark_throughput.py \
    --model mistral-community/pixtral-12b \
    --max-model-len=8192 \
    --data

vllm.title: [Misc] Modify BNB parameter name
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As reviewed in #9917 (comment)
BTW, fix the Resampler prefix bug
ping @mgoin

vllm.title: [CI] Prune tests/models/decoder_only/language/* tests
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Get rid of test_big_models.py to fold in different small versions of architectures into test_models.py
Use small models for test_fp8.py
Test less models in test_gptq_marlin.py, test_gptq_marlin_24.py
Get rid of test_marlin.py and test_qwen.py
Make test_mistral.py more efficient slightly

vllm.title: [CI] Prune back the number of tests in tests/kernels/*
vllm.author: mgoin

vllm.title: [bugfix] fix weak ref in piecewise cudagraph and tractable test
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
@WoosukKwon finds out the piecewise cudagraph has correctness issue, and this pr fixes it.
the toy llama tests pass because the weights are all zero. now they are also fixed.

From the log of these issues: #9096 and #9306
WARNING 10-05 21:26:25 model_runner_base.py:143] Failed to pickle inputs of failed execution: Can't pickle local object 'weak_bind.<locals>.weak_bound'

The engine crashes but cannot pickle the input for further investigation. This is due to ModelInputFo

vllm.title: [Bugfix][SpecDecode] kv corruption with bonus tokens in spec decode
vllm.author: llsj14
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
#5765 enabled the bonus token by arranging model outputs with bonus tokens in mind. However, it only functions correctly when K=1 (num_speculative_tokens).
When K > 1(num_speculative_tokens), each generation step produces a token ID without considering the bonus token. This can lead to a tok

vllm.title: [v1] reduce graph capture time for piecewise cudagraph
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: previously about 5 seconds for every shape, now it is less than 0.5 second.

vllm.title: [Misc] Sort the list of embedding models
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR cleans up the list of embedding models by sorting them and removing the unnecessary merge function.

vllm.author: petersalas

Fix #10025 by adding placeholder index maps to OpenVINOAttentionMetadata.
Fix #10042 by returning DummyData instead of a tuple.
(As per the comment that I copied from AttentionMetadata, this doesn't really belong here and should probably be on ModelInputs instead, but I didn't want to diverge the Op

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix edge-case crash when using chat with the Mistral Tekken Tokenizer
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When running the server with:
vllm serve mistralai/Ministral-8B-Instruct-2410 --tokenizer-mode=mistral

it is possible to crash the engine/server with a simple request:
curl http://localhost:8000/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
      "model": "mistralai/Ministra

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Gpt-j-6B patch kv_scale to k_scale path
vllm.author: arakowsk-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Handles the change in key from kv_scale to k_scale and v_scale for older models which can raise errors on loading model e.g. KeyError: 'transformer.h.0.attn.kv_scale'

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Remove CustomChatCompletionContentPartParam multimodal input type
vllm.author: zifeitong

vllm.title: [V1] Integrate Piecewise CUDA graphs
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR integrates the piecewise CUDA graphs into the V1 model runner.

Set VLLM_TORCH_COMPILE_LEVEL=3 to enable the feature.
The compilation + capturing time takes at most ~17 secs.
Currently, piecewise CUDA graphs are not compatible with custom ops. Therefore, we rely on Torch Inductor to optimize

vllm.title: [distributed] add function to create ipc buffers directly
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
pytorch's ipc handle format can change, and using pytorch for cuda ipc will suffer from pytorch's change. see #9815 for example.
cc @hanzhi713

vllm.title: [CI/Build] drop support for  Python 3.8 EOL
vllm.author: aarnphm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As Python 3.8 reaches EOL, this PR would be a starting point to remove potential code branch on 3.8 only.
I'm still working through all of the code, but this would be a starting point for CI.
Depends on #8469, and wait til PyTorch drop 3.8 support
